headline: Today's top AI story: qwen-code v0.19.12 released
bullets: Analysis: recent open weight models lag frontier closed models' cyber capabilities by 4 to 7 months, a narrower gap than the 6 to 10 months through most of 2025 (AI Security Institute)
Update now: 7-Zip fixes RCE flaw exploitable with malicious archives
